pr.title: Record: DeepQuant V10b — 11L INT6 + 8ep LoRA TTT (val_bpb=0.6430)

output.summary: Applies 8-epoch per-document LoRA TTT with cosine decay, bias tuning, and temperature rescaling atop an INT6 11-layer model.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Val-only training not used; LoRA adaptation occurs during the standard evaluation run.
techniques: 8-epoch LoRA TTT with cosine LR decay and per-block bias tuning
LM-head rank-16 LoRA plus post-TTT temperature rescaling
INT6 quantization with pruning and zstd compression
